SEARCH
Package model

Interface CruiseDAO

All Known Implementing Classes:
DBImplementationCruise
public interface CruiseDAO
Data Access Object interface defining operations for Cruise management.
Author:
Aritz

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    checkCruiseInBook(String id)
    Checks if a cruise is associated with any booking by calling the checkCruiseInBook method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
    boolean
    checkCruiseInWorker(String id)
    Checks if a cruise is associated with any worker by calling the checkCruiseInWorker method of the CruiseDAO implementation with the provided id and returns the result.
    boolean
    deleteCruise(String id)
    Deletes a cruise by calling the deleteCruise method of the CruiseDAO
    List<Cruise>
    getAllCruise()
    Retrieves a list of all cruises by calling the getAllCruise method of the
    Cruise
    getCruiseByCode(String id)
    Retrieves a cruise by calling the getCruiseByCode method of the CruiseDAO
    int
    getNextCruiseCode()
     
    boolean
    insertCruise(Cruise cruise)
    Inserts a new cruise by calling the insertCruise method of the CruiseDAO
    boolean
    updateCruiseByCode(Cruise cruise)
    Updates a cruise by calling the updateCruiseByCode method of the CruiseDAO
